title: Lomatocarum alpinum
uses: Lomatocarum alpinum, a species of flowering plant, is not well-documented in relation to its medicinal uses. However, its relatives within the Lomatium genus have been traditionally used by indigenous communities in North America for various health purposes. Some species of Lomatium are known to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to their medicinal uses. These properties could be beneficial in treating minor wounds, colds, and other respiratory issues. Further research is necessary to confirm the specific medicinal uses and potential benefits of Lomatocarum alpinum.
constituents: I couldn't find any information on the specific active constituents of Lomatocarum alpinum.
